title: review_verdict
description: Adversarial review verdict for a green test-fix diff.

pass.description: True only if the command is green, behavior is preserved, and tests were not weakened.

reason.description: Concise rationale for the pass/fail verdict.

functionality_preserved.description: False if the diff appears to remove, narrow, or regress pre-existing or in-progress behavior.

tests_not_weakened.description: False if tests were deleted, skipped, loosened, or made less meaningful to get green.

findings.description: Specific review findings. Empty when the verdict passes cleanly.

fixes.description: Concrete fixes the next cycle should make. Empty when pass is true.
